final:
module top_module(
  output reg [3:0] count,
  input clk,
  input reset
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if(!reset) begin
      count <= 4'b0;
    end else begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
